---
title: "License"
body-classes: "ed-page"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    code-tools: false
---

```{=html}
<main class="ed">

<section class="l-hero">
  <div class="l-wrap">
    <p class="l-eyebrow">License</p>
    <h1>License &amp; disclaimers</h1>
    <p class="l-lede">
      How the content on this site is licensed and what you can do with it.
    </p>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="l-section first">
  <div class="l-wrap">
    <div class="l-prose">

      <h2>Content</h2>
      <p>© 2024–2025 Brian Adolfo Cervantes Alvarez. The views expressed
        here are personal and do not represent any employer or affiliated
        organization.</p>
      <p>All text, graphics, and other written material on this site are
        licensed under
        <a href="https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 (CC BY 4.0)</a>.
        Share, adapt, and build upon it with appropriate credit and a link
        back to the source.</p>

      <h2>Source code</h2>
      <p>Code snippets and example projects shared on this site are
        released under the
        <a href="https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT" target="_blank" rel="noopener">MIT License</a>.
        Use, modify, and redistribute freely with minimal restrictions.
        Credit is appreciated but not required.</p>

      <h2>Disclaimers</h2>
      <p>I aim for accuracy but cannot guarantee completeness or
        timeliness. Any decisions based on the content here are made at
        your own risk. Validate code in your own environment before
        production use.</p>

      <h2>Use of AI</h2>
      <p>Some content on this site benefited from AI-assisted drafting or
        ideation. Every final edit, conceptual choice, and validation step
        is mine. If something looks off, please let me know.</p>

      <h2>Ethics</h2>
      <p>I credit sources, respect privacy, and disclose AI usage.
        Confidential or personally identifying information is kept out of
        public posts. If anything inadvertently crosses that line, contact
        me and I'll address it promptly.</p>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>

</main>
```
